positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical, monochromatic line art illustration of a celestial forest scene. The composition features stylized, geometrically perfect foliage intertwining with crescent moons and constellations. The central focus is a grand, stylized cosmic tree whose branches are formed from stardust and lunar fragments. The style blends Art Deco luxury with intricate Neo-tribal knotwork. Utilize clean silhouettes, strong negative space, and sharp linework. The color palette should be limited to deep navy blue, cream, and metallic gold accents. Composition must be central, circular, and suitable for screen printing on apparel.
negative: artifacts, blurry, low detail, noise, text, signature, watermark, logo, messy, grainy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, disfigured, poorly drawn, bokeh, jpeg artifacts
